transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you volunteering to lead the campus tour this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. The admissions office asked me to help the new students.

transcript.question_intro: Why will the man lead the campus tour?

questions.prompt: Why will the man lead the campus tour?

choices.text: He wants to visit the campus himself.
The admissions office asked him to help.
He is looking for a classroom.

questions.explanation: He explains that the admissions office requested his help with the campus tour.
questions.evidence: The admissions office asked me to help the new students.
